title: Deal 1 — First Spec Home
summary: Acquire land and build the first spec home as the entry point of the developer transition. The right deal, not the fast one. Don't rush a bad fit just to hit Christmas — the date is a north star, not a deadline that overrides judgment.

phases.label: Define ideal deal criteria (price, ARV, geo, lot size, build type)
Capital stack defined (cash + construction loan + equity partner if any)

action_items.label: Write criteria one-pager (target price, ARV, neighborhood list, lot type)
Pull credit, confirm score meets lender thresholds
Set up separate deal accounting (separate checking, books)

risks: Cash flow. Salvucci #2765 funding the dev block this month — slip on that and Deal 1 capital tightens. Danny license situation means staffing every job costs Max more time. Riley legal could distract or eat cash if it goes badly.
notes: Tied to credit-score readiness (see credit roadmap). Deal 1 ships → lessons feed Deal 2 → Deal 2 + GCC profits feed the compound.
